message:
Fix WASM SQL executor loop logic and stack usage

- Fix nested loop in multi-table joins in WASM executor
- Fix invalid enum panic in column type checking
- Move large stack buffers to static globals in MiniLM model to prevent WASM stack overflow
- Update default TOPK to 1 for NEAR joins
- Correct LIMIT handling in NEAR joins
- Update WASM demo UI with correct join syntax
